Sources.Title: Mike Keen — FunctionalDX pre-expedition blood report
Mike Keen — published diet and expedition test results

TranscriptionNotes: Mike Keen's own Diet Results page describes the linked documents as extensive before-and-after tests used to measure how his body reacted to each expedition diet.
The FunctionalDX report names Mike Keen and labels every value used here as belonging to the 22 February 2024 test.
AgeYears was calculated from the exact date of birth printed in the voluntarily published report and the test date, then rounded to two decimals; the date of birth is not republished here.
The high-sensitivity CRP result was used rather than the report's separate standard CRP result.
